name: @rrr2010/opencode-roundtable
description: Multi-agent round-robin debate plugin for OpenCode

scripts.build: bun build index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --sourcemap --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external @opencode-ai/sdk
scripts.dev:sync: bun run build && for d in "$HOME/.cache/opencode/packages/@rrr2010/opencode-roundtable"*; do cp dist/index.js "$d/node_modules/@rrr2010/opencode-roundtable/dist/index.js"; cp dist/index.js.map "$d/node_modules/@rrr2010/opencode-roundtable/dist/index.js.map"; cp src/tui/tui.tsx "$d/node_modules/@rrr2010/opencode-roundtable/src/tui/tui.tsx"; done
